OneLineDescription: Socketable, leveling enchantment gems — calibrated to your load order.
LongDescription: The load-order patcher for marth's Enchanting Overhaul (MEO). It reads your load order and derives every gem's magnitude curve, elemental recipe, and rank ladder from the enchantments your list actually ships, then rewrites the enchanting perk tree into MEO's gem perks and writes the loot-conversion table. Requires the main MEO mod (SKSE plugin + MEO.esp) from Nexus. Run after installing MEO, and again after any load-order change.
